description: Recto (secondary use): Partnership agreement. In Judaeo-Arabic. Very damaged. The partners are Abū l-Faḍl and Avraham. On top of the Judaeo-Arabic text there are also the remnants of a few lines of large undeciphered Arabic script, some in red ink and some in black ink.
description_he: הסכם שותפות (שימוש משני). ביהודית-ערבית. ניזוק מאוד. השותפים הם אבו אל-פצ'ל ואברהם...
